title: Egypt + Jordan + Jerusalem — full itinerary + Egyptian-scams field-guide (2023)
html:
Egypt + Jordan + Jerusalem — full itinerary + Egyptian-scams field-guide (2023)

Source: 2023-09-06 Apple Note (titled "$"). Mid-trip planning + on-the-ground field notes for Yahir's Jordan → Israel (Jerusalem) → Egypt solo trip.

TL;DR

  • Day-by-day itinerary (Day 9-13): half day in Petra → full day Petra → travel to Jerusalem → full Jerusalem → leave Jerusalem to Amman, fly to Egypt. Concrete budgets noted: $25 Egypt visa, $50 Petra entrance.
  • Jerusalem must-sees: Machane Yehuda market, Church of the Holy Sepulcher, Dome of the Rock (need-to-be-pure to visit), the Garden Tomb, Palace of David, Yad Vashem (Holocaust museum), Old City through Jaffa Gate, Gethsemane Garden + Tomb of the Virgin Mary.
  • Alexandria, Egypt subplan: Bibliotheca Alexandrina, Qaitbey Castle, Karam el Sham (food).
  • Egyptian-scams typology (5 categories observed in real-time):
    1. Far-away Uber accepts knowing he can't make it, hopes you don't cancel after 5min so he gets paid;
    2. Pyramid taxi drivers cancel rides secretly then charge more on arrival;
    3. "I work for the government" credibility play;
    4. "Let me take a picture of you" → tip harassment;
    5. General take-advantage-if-I-can culture.
  • White and Black Desert mentioned as next leg. Best ride so far: Doha-to-Egypt segment (started new anime 86 on the flight).
  • First scam-typology field note in the corpus — Yahir does for Egyptian taxi-scams what he later does for AI SEO tactics: inductive type-classification.
